name: @rederive/rdv
description: The rdv verdict core, re-derived as verified units. The trust-critical decision logic (eq / grade / quorum / hashOk) with adversarial held-out oracles — the verifier, in its own catalog. Verify it or re-derive it with rdv.
provenance: see sir.manifest.json — extracted from rederive cli/verdict.mts (the rdv verdict core)
